rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"decision","text":"Storing per-course role assignments in a dedicated 'course-instructors' collection (with primary/ta/guest roles) rather than embedding in course documents.","scope":"auth/permissions"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Branching dashboard API at /api/instructor/dashboard by user role (admin vs. instructor) instead of separate endpoints.","scope":"src/server"},{"kind":"convention","text":"All new features require unit + integration + E2E tests plus browser verification before passing review.","scope":"testing"}]}
